synthesis: Routine check-in. BP 128/82, glucose 124, both within goal. No symptoms, full medication adherence reported. No coordinator follow-up needed.

turns.content: Good morning, Marcus. This is Vardana checking in for your Day 30. Your BP this morning was 128 over 82 and your fasting glucose was 124 — both right where we want them. How are you feeling today?
Honestly, I feel pretty good today. Sleeping better since I started walking after dinner.
That's great to hear, and the numbers are reflecting it. Are you taking all five of your medications consistently this week?
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Patient reports feeling well. Confirming adherence.

turns.content: Yes — Lisinopril, Amlodipine, Metformin, Atorvastatin, and the baby aspirin. Every day.
Excellent. I'll let David know things are tracking well. Keep up the evening walks — they're clearly helping. Anything you'd like me to flag for him?
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Full adherence confirmed. No flags raised.

turns.content: Take care, Marcus. We'll check in again next week.
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Routine check-in. BP 128/82, glucose 124, both within goal. No symptoms, full medication adherence reported. No coordinator follow-up needed.
